seoTitle: Miling vs Millars Well — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Miling and Millars Well. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Miling vs Millars Well: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Miling and Millars Well.
heading: Miling vs Millars Well — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Miling, Western Australia and Millars Well, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Millars Well has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Miling (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Miling or Millars Well safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Miling has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Millars Well scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Miling scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Millars Well scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Miling or Millars Well?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Millars Well has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
